234 G0110I1_TOILTG_SELF_CD G0110I1_TOILTG_SELF_CD G0110I1 ADL Assistance: Toileting Self Performance Code CHAR 1 The data in this column identifies the resident's self-performance ability with toilet use. -=Not assessed/no information
